name: GitHub: Branch Protection Rules - No Code Owner Reviews
query:
MATCH p=(:GH_BranchProtectionRule {require_code_owner_reviews: false})-[:GH_ProtectedBy]->(:GH_Branch)
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
description: Finds branches where code owner reviews are not required. Changes to security-critical paths can be merged without authorization from the designated code owners.
